title: Phase-0 close substrate-only manifest (live cluster validation deferred to Phase 4)

artifacts.rationale: Deferred to Phase 4 entry per blockers.md §3 API-first sequencing user-signed reconciliation 2026-05-02. NOT a silent fallback per Plan v13 §F. Documented explicitly in evidence_links + open_bugs.

open_bugs.summary: 5 cluster-dependent green-criteria for parent task 0.5 are explicitly deferred to Phase 4 entry per blockers.md §3 API-first sequencing. This prep (0_5_stub_substrate) closes only the stub-substrate portion. Re-validation of full task 0.5 GREEN occurs at Phase 4 entry against OVH BHS H200 cluster.
criteria_deferred: Cancel in-flight LLM job within 5s; partial state persisted (live LLM)
Retry failed retrieval; trace_id preserved (live LLM)
Survive worker SIGKILL; resume on new worker (live LLM)
Job status visible to orchestrator (live LLM)
Trace ID propagates to OpenTelemetry (live LLM)
open_bugs.resolution_path: Phase 4 entry (~2026-08-10): full task_0_5 verdict supersedes this prep on live OVH BHS H200 cluster

codex_findings_addressed: P1 (iter 1, 0_5_stub_substrate): task_id mismatch — manifest now self-identifies as `0_5_stub_substrate` matching the prep id (parent 0.5 referenced separately).
P1 (iter 1): Missing U7 fields — manifest now has phase, started_at, estimate_hours, changed_files, artifacts[], evidence_links[], open_bugs[].

P1 (iter 1): Non-executable test command — removed `deferred - requires OVH BHS H200 cluster online` from test_commands. Cluster deferral is now documented in `open_bugs[0]` instead, which is the U7-compliant location for known-deferred scope.
P1 (iter 1): Future-dated completed_at — corrected to 2026-05-03T06:25:16Z (current UTC at time of write).

P1 (iter 1): diff_sha mismatch — pre-existing orchestrator brief inconsistency (diff_sha excludes manifests/ per gate convention; brief now annotates this so future Codex reviewers don't flag the legitimate empty-hash-for-manifest-only-change pattern). Patched in this same commit-set.
substrate_honesty_attestation: Phase-0-PARTIAL-honest framing per Plan v13 §F (no SILENT fallback). This manifest closes the orchestrator-completable portion of task 0.5 — stub-substrate validation against the local v6 test suite + module presence check. Live-LLM-cluster portions of task 0.5 GREEN criteria are explicitly deferred to Phase 4 entry per blockers.md §3 API-first sequencing user-signed canonical reconciliation 2026-05-02. The deferral is documented in open_bugs[0] with explicit resolution_path. NOT a silent degradation.
